data.title: 国际服炸服 #26
data.summary: [9/24 (Wed) Temporary Maintenance Notice] Temporary maintenance will be carried out during the sched
data.body:
[9/24 (Wed) Temporary Maintenance Notice]

Temporary maintenance will be carried out during the schedule below to improve game performance and stability.
To ensure safe data storage and maintenance procedures, please make sure to end or suspend any ongoing gameplay, such as Total Assault, before the maintenance begins.

- Schedule: 9/24 (Wed) 6:00 AM – 8:00 AM(UTC)
- ![113e0bdca95c4f4088444d77971bf6dd.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16130/1l3WkLf0RWJJBlDJcNFKPAhFINWitneD.jpg)
